content.rendered:
Roof Replacements in Melbourne

If your roof is heavily damaged or you want to give your Melbourne property a completely different look, Seven Roofing’s roof replacement services are for you. 

At Seven Roofing, our team can quickly and seamlessly complete a roof replacement job in  a short time-frame. Our roof replacement services involve removing your existing roof and replacing it with a completely new surface. Full roof replacements are generally recommended when your roof has become significantly dilapidated to the point where repairs or roof restorations would be impractical and expensive. 

When you work with us, we’ll provide you with a newly designed roof that enhances your home’s aesthetic appeal and ensures a durable structure that will last for years to come. 

Our team will supply and install a brand-new roof for you, utilising the best Australian products on the market today. We’ll also make sure the process of replacing your roof is seamless and stress-free.

If you’re unsure if roof replacements are for you, you can discuss your needs with the Seven Roofing team today. We’ll help you determine whether a full roof replacement would be the best option for you. You can get in touch by calling 0404 402 145 or by emailing info@sevenroofing.com.au.

Why Work with Us

Here are just a few more reasons to choose Seven Roofing for roof replacements:

  • We’re Fully Qualified, Insured, and Trusted HIA Members
  • You Get Fixed Prices for Your New Roof, with No Hidden Costs
  • You Get an Extensive 10-Year Warranty for Your Roof
  • We Offer a Money-Back Guaranteed Service
  • Seven Roofing Uses the Latest Roofing Technology
  • Payment Plans Available

 

Our team also provides a range of other roofing services for commercial and residential properties in Melbourne. This includes:

  • Roof Repairs
  • Roof Restoration
  • Roof Leak Repairs
  • Gutter Replacements

 

We work with clients in Brunswick, Epping, Preston, Coburg, Reservoir, Thomastown, Campbellfield, Heidelberg, Thornbury, Bundoora, Mill Park, South Morang, Keilor East, Sunshine, Essendon, Williamstown, Avondale Heights, St Albans, Moonee Ponds, and Greenvale.

excerpt.rendered: Whether you’re suffering from a heavily damaged roof or wanting a completely new roof altogether, get in touch with us today for our quality roof replacement services. We’ll make sure your new roof has a stunning look and a long-lasting durable surface.
